main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/1.01|1.01]] |gameversion=1.01 |date=July 24, 2023 |summary='''Rashid Release'''. Bug fixes with some minor balance changes mainly for Modern controls. |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/en/battle_change/20230724 Patch Notes] }} == Rashid Patch == * Rashid released
== '''Universal Changes''' == * '''{{clr|DR|Drive Rush Cancel}}''' ** Can now be performed with {{clr|M|MP}}+{{clr|M|MK}} (Classic) or Drive Parry button (Modern), only while holding Neutral or Forward ** {{clr|L|Light}} normals are now cancelable into {{clr|DR|DRC}} even on whiff due to the low risk of these easier inputs * '''Drive Parry''' ** Fixed issue where {{clr|M|MK}} would come out if Parry was buffered during a screen freeze and then released before the Parry occurred * '''Install {{clr|SA|Supers}}''' ** Fixed issue where unintended behavior would occur if hit by an attack on the exact frame the install timer expired * '''Assist Combos (Modern)''' ** Fixed issue where Assist Combo inputs were not properly buffered, and where the 2nd attack of an Assist Combo would be performed even with only 1 input * '''{{clr|OD|OD Special Moves}} (Modern)''' ** Fixed issue where some moves could not be manually input while holding the Assist button.
== '''Key Character Changes''' == === '''Blanka''' === * '''Charge Special Moves - Modern Controls''' (Rolling Attack, Aerial Rolling Attack, Vertical Rolling Attack) ** Fixed issue where charge time was unintentionally 10 frames longer and input was not recognized for the usual 10 frames after the Forward or Up input ** Charge Time: 50f → 40f; Input Recognition Time: 0f → 10f * {{clr|M|j.MP}} ** Fixed issue where special cancel could not be performed if the move was parried * Back Throw ({{clr|L|4LPLK}}) ** Fixed issue where {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} built the same amount of {{clr|SA|Super}} gauge is a standard throw * {{clr|H|HP Aerial Rolling Attack}} ({{clr|H|j.[4]6HP}}) ** Fixed issue where Blanka's recovery changed if the opponent blocked while in Burnout
=== '''Cammy''' === * {{clr|H|HK Cannon Strike}} ({{clr|H|j.214HK}}) ** Fixed issue where {{clr|H|j.HK}} would come out instead if input at earliest timing * {{clr|OD|OD Quick Spin Knuckle}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) ** Fixed issue where opponent's attack could come out in the wrong direction if input during the side switch
=== '''Chun-Li''' === * '''Charge Special Moves - Modern Controls''' (Kikoken) ** Fixed issue where meterless version charge time was unintentionally 5 frames shorter; Charge Time: 45f → 50f ** Fixed issue where input was not recognized for the usual 10 frames after the Forward input (all versions); Input Recognition Time: 0f → 10f * Forward/Back/Air Throw ({{clr|L|LPLK}}/{{clr|L|4LPLK}}/{{clr|L|j.LPLK}}) ** Fixed issue where Charge timing would be reset during the successful throw animations * Serenity Stream (214P) ** Fixed issue where canceling attacks into 214P~K would result in Hazanshu (214K)
=== '''Dee Jay''' === * {{clr|H|Face Breaker}} ({{clr|H|4HK}}) ** Fixed issue where {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} Drive Damage was higher vs. airborne opponents * Back Throw ({{clr|L|4LPLK}}) ** Fixed issue where {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} built the same amount of {{clr|SA|Super}} gauge is a standard throw
=== '''Dhalsim''' === * {{clr|L|Agile Kick}} ({{clr|L|1LK}}) ** Chain cancel version no longer works with {{clr|L|2LK}} input (Classic controls only; no change to Modern) * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Arch}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) ** Fixed issue where the projectile would reappear after the {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} cinematic * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Comet}} ({{clr|OD|j.63214PP}}) ** Fixed issue where Dhalsim could no longer perform mid-air moves when parried by the opponent
=== '''E. Honda''' === * {{clr|L|2LP}} ** Fixed issue where the chained version could be kara-canceled on startup * {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}) ** Fixed issue where E. Honda would gain much more Drive gauge when parried than other characters
=== '''Jamie''' === * Modern {{clr|L|2L}} ** Changed from {{clr|L|2LK}} → {{clr|L|2LP}} so that he has access to a 4-frame attack
=== '''Juri''' === * 1-Stock Enhanced {{clr|L|Saihasho}} / {{clr|M|Ankensatsu}} / {{clr|H|Go Ohatsu}} ({{clr|L|236LK}}/{{clr|M|236MK}}/{{clr|H|236HK}}) ** Fixed issue where the 1st frame could be kara-canceled into {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} (allowing unintended combo routes with 2 stocks)
=== '''Kimberly''' === * {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} ({{clr|SA|236233P}}) ** Fixed issue where it could hit cross-up (behind Kimberly)
=== '''Lily''' === * {{clr|OD|OD Condor Dive}} ({{clr|OD|j.PPP}}) ** Fixed issue where Lily could perform this from a back jump by plinking the inputs (j.PP~P) * {{clr|SA|Air SA2}} ({{clr|SA|j.236236K}}) ** Fixed issue where Lily could not perform this from a back jump if the inputs where plinked ** Fixed issue where the opponent would not be KO'd if the 2nd hit connected mid-air
=== '''Marisa''' === * Scutum (Modern {{clr|DR|6S}}) ** Fixed issue where after a counter-attack, a Down input would cause Marisa to exit the stance even while holding the {{clr|DR|S}} button, making it difficult to perform Enfold ({{clr|DR|6S}}~{{clr|DR|2S}})
=== '''Ryu''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue where extra combo scaling would sometimes be applied, resulting in lower damage
=== '''Zangief''' === * Fixed issue where Drive gauge recovery during Burnout was slower than other characters * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Fixed bug where Zangief was considered airborne during the successful throw animation, resulting in less Drive gauge build than usual
